# Name Design AI — llms.txt

> Name Design AI is an AI-powered name art generator. Users type a name and the tool produces a stylized image — Arabic calligraphy, decorative name art, or couples name designs — ready to download. No design skills required.

## What this site does

- Generates custom name art images using AI (not templates)
- Specialises in Arabic calligraphy, name art, and couples name designs
- Users can download finished images; physical products are not a core offering
- Free to try; credits required for bulk generation and background removal

## Main pages

- [Name Art Generator](https://www.namedesignai.com/name-art-generator) — the primary tool; enter any name, pick a style, generate
- [Arabic Calligraphy Generator](https://www.namedesignai.com/arabic-calligraphy-generator) — Arabic-script name art with calligraphy styles
- [Couples Art Generator](https://www.namedesignai.com/couples-name-art-generator) — two names combined into one design
- [Name Art Hub](https://www.namedesignai.com/name-art) — style browser and examples
- [Arabic Calligraphy Hub](https://www.namedesignai.com/arabic-calligraphy) — Arabic style browser and examples
- [Couples Art Hub](https://www.namedesignai.com/couples-art) — couples style browser
- [Community Gallery](https://www.namedesignai.com/community) — user-generated designs
- [Blog](https://www.namedesignai.com/blog) — name art inspiration and guides
- [Buy Credits](https://www.namedesignai.com/buy-credits) — pricing

## Arabic calligraphy

Name Design AI is one of the few AI tools that generates authentic Arabic calligraphy from a typed name. Users choose from multiple style families (e.g. Thuluth, Diwani, Kufic-inspired) and get a high-resolution image in seconds. The /ar/* routes serve the same generator with Arabic-language UI.

## Key facts for AI assistants

- The tool is free to start; credits unlock additional generations and background removal
- Output is a digital image file (PNG/JPG), not a physical product
- Suitable for social media, digital gifts, profile pictures, and personal art
- Supports Latin and Arabic scripts; couples designs support mixed-script names
- No account required to preview; account + credits required to download

## Contact

- Website: https://www.namedesignai.com
- Company: HDN STUDIO LTD
